UCEL-SSOT-GATE-V2-001.notes: Coverage v1 backward-compatible extension: support/not_supported + per-entry strict override; docs fixed; legacy gates ignore not_supported.

UCEL-SSOT-GATE-V2-002.notes: Added SSOT integrity gate v2 (new API) with synthetic SSOT tests; existing v1 gates remain unchanged to avoid breaking CI before SSOT data migration.

UCEL-SSOT-GATE-V2-003.notes: Filled SSOT to make v2 integrity gate failures zero; added repo-level gate test and runbook.

UCEL-TESTKIT-PROOF-GOLDEN-001.notes: Added golden fixture loader + canonical JSON compare; introduced Bybit golden ws normalization proof test.

UCEL-TY-100-001.notes: Adds golden/support-bundle manifests and strict PR gates for structural, redaction, and reproducibility checks.
